findings.title: passCount re-enumerates the 5 rule keys already held in `rules` (DRY-knowledge; rule-count 5 also hardcoded in the ===5 / >=3 thresholds) — Object.values(rules).filter(Boolean).length is an equivalent single source
No initial render(): checklist glyphs / tier-label / bar stay blank at page load (and after clearing) until the first keystroke
Scoring core (length gate, Fair/Weak boundary, broad special-char regex, live-region tier-change guard) has no automated test

summary: Clean review. 6 finders (correctness, spec-adherence, plan-adherence, test-gaps, risk-classify, principles) + 3 adversarial verifiers. Plan fully followed (6/6 units); risk class none; 8/9 ACs fully met, AC4 met post-typing. After refute-by-default verification, 1 of 3 substantive findings survives: a low-severity DRY-knowledge cleanup in passCount. The initial-render gap (spec-authorized resting state) and the test-coverage notes (accepted no-framework spec decision; paths behaviorally verified at VERIFY) were refuted. No bugs, security, risk, or floor violations.
